requirement: [Memory Transfer (Host ↔ Device)] Support asynchronous memory transfers via CUDA streams

test_cases.description: Validate asynchronous memory transfer from host to device using CUDA streams
steps: Create CUDA stream for asynchronous memory transfer
Allocate memory on host and device
Initiate asynchronous memory transfer from host to device
Verify data integrity on the device
test_cases.expected_result: Data transferred successfully from host to device asynchronously

test_cases.description: Validate edge cases for asynchronous memory transfer between host and device using CUDA streams
steps: Test with large data size for transfer
Simulate low memory conditions on host or device
Verify behavior with multiple concurrent memory transfers
Check performance impact with varying CUDA stream priorities
test_cases.expected_result: Asynchronous memory transfer handles edge cases gracefully without data corruption or crashes

test_cases.description: Evaluate performance of asynchronous memory transfer using CUDA streams
steps: Benchmark asynchronous memory transfer speed for different data sizes
Compare performance with synchronous memory transfer
Analyze impact of CUDA stream configurations on transfer speed
test_cases.expected_result: Asynchronous memory transfer demonstrates improved performance compared to synchronous transfer

test_cases.description: Integrate asynchronous memory transfer feature with existing GPU simulation pipeline
steps: Modify simulation pipeline to incorporate asynchronous memory transfer
Run simulation with asynchronous memory transfers enabled
Verify simulation results with and without asynchronous transfers
test_cases.expected_result: Asynchronous memory transfer seamlessly integrates with GPU simulation pipeline without errors

test_cases.description: Ensure that asynchronous memory transfer functionality remains stable across driver updates
steps: Perform asynchronous memory transfers with current driver version
Update GPU driver to a newer version
test_cases.expected_result: Asynchronous memory transfer functionality does not regress with GPU driver updates
